name: Test viewing non-existent user returns 404
description:
Verify requesting a non-existent user returns 404

        Expected:
        - 404 Not Found
descriptionHtml:
Verify requesting a non-existent user returns 404

    Expected:
    - 404 Not Found
statusTrace:
self = <test_user_management.TestUserManagementEdgeCases object at 0x7a954dd5afb0>, admin_client = <utils.api_clientv2.APIClient object at 0x7a954da981f0>

    @allure.story("Non-Existent User")
    @allure.title("Test viewing non-existent user returns 404")
    def test_get_nonexistent_user_404(self, admin_client):
        """
        Verify requesting a non-existent user returns 404
    
        Expected:
        - 404 Not Found
        """
        # Use a very large user_id that likely doesn't exist
        nonexistent_user_id = 999999999
    
        endpoint = settings.USER_GET.replace("{user_id}", str(nonexistent_user_id))
        response = admin_client.get(endpoint)
    
>       assert response.status_code == 404, (
            f"Non-existent user should return 404, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Non-existent user should return 404, got 403: {"detail":{"message":"You do not have permission to perform this action.","code":"AUTHORIZATION_ERROR","timestamp":1776416764.4184678,"details":null}}
E       assert 403 == 404
E        +  where 403 = <Response [403 Forbidden]>.status_code

test_api_v2/test_auth/test_user_management.py:419: AssertionError
